scripts.dev: npm run sync-middleware && concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm run sync-middleware && npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.cpSync('client/dist', 'dist', { recursive: true })"
